channel.title: Azure VMs on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure VMs on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: OpenTelemetry Metrics, Visualizations, and Enhanced Monitoring in Azure Monitor for Azure VMs and Arc Servers
item.description:
Azure Monitor for Azure VMs and Arc Servers now generally available with OpenTelemetry metrics and visualizations, providing a unified monitoring experience. The release consolidates key monitoring capabilities into a single experience.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: SQL Server on Azure VMs in Malaysia West, Indonesia Central
item.description:
SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines is now generally available in the Malaysia West and Indonesia Central Azure regions. This expands deployment options for SQL Server workloads closer to users and supports data residency needs.

  • Source: Azure Updates
